name: Tat Gida Sanayi A.S.
summary: Tat Gida Sanayi A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production, distribution, marketing, trade, and brokerage of semi-finished and finished goods in Turkey and internationally. The company also provides canned foods, such as tomato paste, vegetables products, tomato products, ready foods, pickles, delicatessen, organic products, boiled products, and jams; and sauces, such as ketchup, mayonnaise, mustard, and condiment sauces under the TAT brand name. The company was formerly known as Tat Konserve Sanayii AS. and changed its name to Tat Gida Sanayi A.S. in November 2013. Tat Gida Sanayi A.S. was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
